- Russia Collusion. Hillary bought fake info from a foreign spy.
- Ukraine impeachment. Better hide that money laundering, Democrats, and fast!
- COVID. One of the largest and most far reaching events in history and not a word is said about it anymore. It was only 5 years ago.
- Vaccines for Covid. Oops more proof every day they weren't ready.
- Kyle Rittenhouse
- George Floyd
- Hunter's laptop
- Biden's health
- The current President was almost assassinated a handful of times and it was treated like someone snatching a purse.

But they are always sure they are right THIS time.
